minor-second.name: Minor Second
minor-second.description: Subtle, almost imperceptible. Good for dense information dashboards.

major-second.name: Major Second
major-second.description: Very subtle, safe choice for text-heavy interfaces.

minor-third.name: Minor Third
minor-third.description: Pleasant, harmonious step. Popular for body text systems.

major-third.name: Major Third
major-third.description: Clear musical interval. Good balance for general UI.

perfect-fourth.name: Perfect Fourth
perfect-fourth.description: Bold, creates clear hierarchy. Very popular in modern web design.

augmented-fourth.name: Augmented Fourth / Tritone
augmented-fourth.description: Dramatic leap, high contrast. Use for editorial or poster-like layouts.

minor-sixth.name: Minor Sixth
minor-sixth.description: Wide expressive range for dramatic typography.

major-sixth.name: Major Sixth
major-sixth.description: Very wide spacing, suitable for hero sections.

octave.name: Octave
octave.description: Extreme contrast, poster-like or monumental scale.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: User-defined ratio. Provide a numeric value directly.
